quiz.question:
Black moves the king to g3.

Has the game ended?

answers.text: The game is not over. White can still make a move.

feedback.text: That's correct. White can move the king to g1.

distractors.text: The game is over. It's checkmate.

feedback.text: White's king is not under attack yet and it can move, so the game is not over yet.

distractors.text: The White king can't move and it is not under attack, so it's stalemate.

feedback.text: The White king can move to g1!
